notes: Very warm with winds blowing out to center'ish at 10+mph, nice hitting weather.
Warm with winds blowing out. I think there's enough dry air to squeeze a game in before storms arrive later in the afternoon, but I won't rule out some later inning trouble.
Clear skies with very light winds. No weather concerns for this afternoon matchup.
YELLOW/GREEN - A storm line gets close to PIT, but I think it holds just north and they play ball without issue. Worth a pre-game check, but likely fine.
Warm and humid evening in Philly. Winds blowing gently out to center. Good hitting environment.
YELLOW/GREEN - The main storm line clears pregame. Behind that line there are some showers, but it doesn't look like a washout. Most likely outcome is that they play ball.
Storms stay well north. No issues. Typical warm Cincinnati evening.
GREEN/YELLOW - Looks to me like the rain holds north. Warm with winds blowing out at near 10mph.
Perfect baseball weather in Atlanta. Clear skies and light winds blowing toward the left-field seats.
Rain in the area suggests the roof will be closed for this one. Temperature inside will be controlled.
Storms moving through Chicago. High chance for an early delay, but they should be able to clear a window to play later in the night.
Indoor game at Minute Maid Park. No weather impact on gameplay.
Standard cool and clear San Diego evening. Typical sea breeze blowing in from right field.
Game played at Sutter Health Park in Sacramento. Clear skies and mild temperatures.
Clear and pleasant evening at Dodger Stadium. Winds blowing gently out to center field.
